name: ai_marketing_claude
description: An AI-driven marketing toolkit featuring 15 marketing skills powered by parallel subagents. It supports website audits, marketing copy generation, email sequences, ad campaigns, content calendars, competitive intelligence, and produces client-ready PDF reports.

inputs.name: website_url
inputs.description: URL of the website to audit or analyze.

inputs.name: marketing_brief
inputs.description: Brief or information about the marketing goals or campaign requirements.

inputs.name: target_audience
inputs.description: Description of the intended audience for copy or campaigns.

inputs.name: product_details
inputs.description: Information about the product or service for marketing content generation.

inputs.name: campaign_parameters
inputs.description: Settings and constraints regarding email sequences, ad budgets, timings, or platform preferences.

outputs.name: website_audit_report
outputs.description: Detailed audit results of the website covering marketing and content aspects.

outputs.name: marketing_copy
outputs.description: Generated high-quality marketing copy for ads, websites, or emails.

outputs.name: email_sequence
outputs.description: A sequence of emails crafted for marketing or customer engagement.

outputs.name: ad_campaign_plan
outputs.description: Structured plan and content for advertising campaigns.

outputs.name: content_calendar
outputs.description: A schedule for content publication or marketing activities.

outputs.name: competitive_intelligence_report
outputs.description: Insights and analysis comparing competitors in the market.

outputs.name: client_ready_pdf_report
outputs.description: Formatted PDF report synthesizing marketing insights and campaign suggestions.

steps: Receive input parameters including website URL, marketing brief, target audience, and campaign details
Initiate parallel subagents specialized in different marketing functions
Perform website audit to extract actionable marketing insights
Generate marketing copy tailored to the product and audience
Create email sequences and ad campaigns based on campaign parameters
Develop a content calendar aligned with marketing schedules
Compile competitive intelligence to inform marketing strategy
Consolidate outputs into a client-ready PDF report
Return structured outputs for user review and deployment
use_cases: Performing comprehensive marketing audits for client websites
Generating tailored marketing copy and email sequences to boost engagement
Planning and organizing advertising campaigns with automated assistance
Creating content publication calendars to streamline marketing efforts
Producing competitive intelligence reports to guide business strategy
Delivering professional marketing reports in PDF format for clients
patterns: Use of parallel subagents to handle distinct marketing skill sets concurrently
Modular handling of marketing skills like auditing, copywriting, campaign planning
Automated generation of multi-format marketing assets (text, calendar, PDF)
Integration of competitive intelligence for strategic marketing insights
Structured output formatting for client presentations and reports

prompt_templates.name: website_audit_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Audit the following website focusing on marketing effectiveness and content quality: {website_url}

prompt_templates.name: copy_generation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate compelling marketing copy for a product with these details: {product_details}, targeting {target_audience}.

prompt_templates.name: email_sequence_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Create an email sequence for a campaign with the following parameters: {campaign_parameters}.

prompt_templates.name: ad_campaign_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Plan an advertising campaign based on this marketing brief: {marketing_brief}.

prompt_templates.name: competitive_intelligence_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Provide a competitive intelligence analysis for the market related to: {product_details}.

prompt_templates.name: content_calendar_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Build a content calendar for the marketing initiatives based on: {campaign_parameters}.
